meaning: adj.不精通的,不熟练的,无知的,无经验的
examples: Unversed in the jargon of the social scientist.
It's gratis. That's free, for those unversed in Latin.
We are unversed in the jargon of the social scientist.
Holley has represented Lohan throughout numerous court proceedings, but the actress opted to have Heller, a New York lawyer unversed in California law, represent her in recent months.
Holley has represented Lohan throughout numerous court proceedings, but the actress opted to have Heller, a lawyer from New York unversed in California law, represent her in recent months.
